title: Thunder Sword
description: This is a Plugin that Makes all Gold Swords summon LIGHTNING when you hit something with them!
body:
ThunderStick is a lightweight Minecraft plugin that transforms every golden sword into a weapon of divine fury. When a player strikes any entity with a gold sword, a bolt of lightning is summoned at the target’s location, delivering instant spectacle and elemental chaos. No commands, no configuration — just plug and play.
Perfect for mythic servers, PvP arenas, or chaotic minigames, ThunderStick adds cinematic flair with minimal setup. Whether you're smiting mobs or dueling players, wielding a ThunderStick feels like channeling the storm itself.
Built for Spigot and Paper 1.20+, this plugin is designed to be modular and easily expandable. Future updates may include cooldowns, particle effects, lore-based activation, and custom crafting recipes. Released under the MIT License — free to use, modify, and electrify.
